content.text:
<user_query>
Run a live regression audit across both production and dev BIQc websites, covering desktop and mobile views.

Targets:
- Prod: https://biqc.ai
- Dev: https://biqc-web-dev.azurewebsites.net

Checklist to verify on BOTH environments:
1) Homepage loads successfully.
2) Menu/navigation changes from the approved website-diagram enhancement are present.
3) Hero text includes "How BIQc Works" where expected.
4) CTA text "Start For Free Today" appears as expected.
5) Diagram/hero layout appears correct and not obviously regressed.
6) Key nav links (at least 5) are clickable and route correctly.
7) Mobile menu opens/closes and routes correctly.

For desktop and mobile, gather concrete evidence (observed labels/text/routes), and produce a PASS/FAIL table per environment with notes.

Return ONLY:
- Desktop prod results
- Mobile prod results
- Desktop dev results
- Mobile dev results
- Any regressions found with exact page/element names.
</user_query>
I'll conduct a comprehensive regression audit of both BIQc websites across desktop and mobile views. Let me start by examining both environments systematically.
Let me check the MCP tools directory structure:
